---
id: setdocvisibility
title: "Hide or unhide docs"
description: "Sets the visibility-override state of the documents specified, effectively hiding or un-hiding documents."

api:

  method={"post"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/governance/documents/visibilityoverrides"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets the visibility-override state of the documents specified, effectively hiding or un-hiding documents.
